author: ec2-user
text: Implemented aiocoap 0.4.17 lifecycle integration with exact dependency pin: directional OSCORE correlations; message-admission identities across NSTART backlog; exact CON ciphertext retransmission; matched ACK/RST and MAX_RETRANSMIT cleanup; terminal/failure atomicity; context-generation synchronization; task-draining shutdown; empty control passthrough; bounded Observe cancellation tombstones retaining request IDs for repeated CON/RST until EXCHANGE_LIFETIME. Added real aiocoap backlog/timeout tests and paired deterministic real-OSCORE equal-token tests. Validation: tests/coap 239 passed, packaging 6 passed, lifecycle 41 passed, Ruff clean, uv lock --check clean, git diff --check clean. Three independent final reviews found no P0-P2 findings. Residual protocol limitation: aiocoap 0.4.17 cannot proactively send Observe=1 cancellation; NON-only remote observations rely on server expiry while local state expires boundedly.
